blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
